title: Contains all properties used for json data files within the dungeon crawler world game.
description: Contains all properties used for json data files within the dungeon crawler world game.

prerequisites.$comment: This is a list of all the prerequisites needed to use this ability.

requirements.$comment: This is a list of all the requirements needed to unlock this ability.

Abilities.$comment: This is a list of all the abilities available.

classes.$comment: This is the list of classes provided by the input or connected to the inputs.

sub_classes.$comment: This is the list of subclasses connected to the input classes.

description.$comment: This is the description of the thing.

type.$comment: This is the type of the thing.

damage.$comment: This is the damage dealt by the thing.

oneOf.$comment: This is the level of the thing.
This allows for level descriptors like 'high' or 'low'.

level.$comment: This is the level of the thing.

name.$comment: This is the name of the thing.

range.$comment: This is the range of the ability.

duration.$comment: This is the duration of the ability.

cost.$comment: This is the cost of using the ability.

cooldown.$comment: This is the cooldown period for using the ability.
